race.description: Mates In Construction Provincial Bm68 Hcp
race.comment: RIDE THE RIVER (4) ploughed through the heavy going to win two back at Kembla Grange. Couldn't follow that up with a tiring seventh over 1000m at Albury. Placed here last prep and look for a much better effort with the nice weight drop. STRATAFY (5) fifth-up for this and a win looks imminent. Closed strongly from the wide gate with an unlucky second over 1000m at Gosford in BM64 grade. Struggling to draw a good gate this campaign. Each-way. BONDASONG (6) caught the eye second-up at the big odds with a tidy fourth over 1250m at Newcastle. Must be included. HARRY THE THIEF (2) is a talented type who returned from a break last start and made it two wins from as many starts with a fast finishing victory over 1000m at the Sapphire Coast. Won on debut here and looks up to the task.
